name: nutrition-tracker-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Nutrition tracking and dietary analysis by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: log_meal
tools.description: Log a meal with foods and serving sizes. Foods are matched against built-in database.

tools.name: get_daily_summary
tools.description: Get a summary of all meals logged today for a user.

tools.name: check_nutrient_balance
tools.description: Check if today's nutrition is balanced against recommended targets.

tools.name: suggest_foods
tools.description: Suggest foods high in a specific nutrient, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: get_calorie_estimate
tools.description: Estimate calories for a food item. Matches against database or estimates from description.
